Los Angeles County is home to more than 1000 schools, across dozens of school districts. Most California School Calendars are traditional, and run from Fall, through Winter, to Spring, with Summer vacation starting in either May or June. But each school district sets slightly different dates for the first day of school, school breaks and vacations, and the last day of school before Summer Break. What are the Summer Break Holidays in LA in AUgust? - Tripadvisor Most local schools are on summer break until just after Labor Day which is September 3rd this year so crowds at Disney will probably be large throughout August. Not all schools in LA are on the same calendar, but yes, most local schools are on summer break until just after Labor Day which is September 3rd this year so crowds at Disney will probably be large throughout August. School Schedules for the Los Angeles Unified School District start anywhere from the first week in August to the first week in September, add to that all the other school districts in the Southwest (For example, the city of Anaheim, where Disneyland is located has 8 different school districts!). So let's talk averages, a good place to look is at Disneyland itself. their Operating hours for August haven't been posted yet, but the Annual Pass Blockout dates have been. If you look at the Southern California AP, you will see the following expectations by Disney... So The first three weeks in August will be very busy with out-of-town guests, to require them to be blocked out. Then on August 20th, they open up the pass, as they expect smaller crowds. So that is what Disney thinks, they also start cutting back on the hours and entertainment on that date. One issue, a lot of folks are still off school that have that pass, and therefore those first few days can actually become busier than the week before. (They have been blocked out since late June). After Labor Day (Sept. 3rd, 2012) then Disney goes back to off-season hours Disneyland is located in Anaheim which is about a 45 min drive South of the LA area, so its a good idea to also post in the Anaheim forum if you have more Disneyland related questions such as where to stay, ect. It makes no difference what the Los Angeles summer holidays are for schools, as Disneyland is an international destination. August is a summer holiday for all Europeans, and most American schools are out of school in August (going back to school on various dates in August and September). I"ve been to Disneyland a few times, and it always seems busy, we have been in May and June before , but thought August may be a bit busier. They have the fast passes you can use as well anyway don't they, we'll get a 4 day pass so will give us plenty of time to get around.

adjudication.answer: Summer vacation for California schools generally begins in late May or early June. Specific dates vary by school district, and while 2024-2025 calendars are available, it is recommended to confirm with local districts. Summer break typically concludes around early September, with some districts like LAUSD starting their new school year in late August or early September.
adjudication.final_reasoning: Supporting and partial documents consistently describe the general timing of summer break and acknowledge district-specific variations, allowing for a comprehensive answer.

evaluation.feedback: The answer accurately reflects the provided documents, stating that summer break typically starts in late May or early June and ends around early September, with variations by district. Citations are relevant and support the claims.
